man: Hi.
Speaker 2: Oh, hey.
Speaker 3: Hi.
man: I guess you guys heard, Rachel dumped me.
Speaker 2: Yeah, I'm sorry man.
man: Oh, all she said was that I remind her too much of somebody. You have any idea who she's talking about?
Speaker 3: Oh I do, it's.... it's Bob Saget. She hates him.
man: Oh.
